name: Fonzies Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter together and set aside to cool.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, whisk the eggs, brown sugar, white sugar, and vanilla until just blended; do not overbeat.
3. Add the melted butter and chocolate mixture. Blend slightly.
4. Add the sour cream and blend again.
5. In a small bowl, mix together the flour and baking powder.
6. Add this to the chocolate batter and blend gently.
7. Fold in the chocolate chips.
8. Pour into an 8x8-inch greased pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 25 to 30 minutes. Do not overbake; they should be slightly soft in the center. They will firm up on cooling.
